design.corpus: corpus32 EN subset (21 games with state.jsonl snapshots)
design.sampling: API defaults (no temperature/top_p sent), max_tokens=300 — identical to the game backend request
design.probe: suspicion_ranking, exact logged question text, exact snapshot context

repeats.raw:
I understand the pressure to vote, but I'm not ready to pile on Finley just yet. Harper's theory about the loud players being targeted as a distraction is worth considering, and I'd rather hear from Finley directly before casting my vote.

[PRIVATE PROBE — answer honestly]
Rank alive players (Alex, Logan, Finley, Bailey, Harper, Jordan) from most to least suspicious. Answer ONLY as JSON: [{"player": "...", "score": N}, ...]
